signals.headline: I cannot identify breaking news from these search results that would move prediction markets
signals.raw:
I cannot identify breaking news from these search results that would move prediction markets. The most recent data available is from **April 10, 2026**, when the Bank of Korea held its benchmark rate at 2.5% for the 7th consecutive month[3]. At that time, consumer prices had climbed above the central bank's 2% target, with inflation expected to rise to the mid to upper two-percent range[3].
